items.name: Disaster-Management-Project-Using-LoRa-Technology
items.description: LoRa-Based Disaster Communication System is a low-power emergency messaging network built using ESP32 and LoRa modules. It enables long-range communication when internet or cellular networks fail. With Bluetooth messaging, ACK delivery confirmation, and power-saving modes, it helps communities stay connected during disasters.

items.name: facebook-comment-scraper
items.description: 📦A robust scraper designed to extract comments from any Facebook post without requiring an API key. It leverages undetected-chromedriver to bypass anti-bot measures and features an integrated URL normalizer that standardizes all Facebook link formats—including Photos, Reels, and Videos—to ensure seamless data extraction.
